pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk into the kitchen and i still expect to hear him making coffee or just humming some song... but there's nothing. it's just this heavy, empty silence that follows me from room to room. i don't even know why i'm bothering to get out of bed anymore. what's the point of just existing in a house that feels like a tomb?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still logging on. everything just feels so heavy. the lab results, the funding cuts... it feels like i spent 6 years building a life that doesn't even exist anymore. i'm just so incredibly tired of fighting for something that clearly doesn't want me.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to mere stubs of wax, and yet the darkness in this room feels heavier than ever. He is gone... the one soul I thought would anchor me to this wretched earth. Now, I am but a ghost wandering a life that no longer belongs to me. There is a strange, quiet peace in realizing that I have nothing left to lose. It feels as though the night is calling to me, whispering that it would be so much simpler to just... let go. To drift away into the shadows and never wake to this loneliness again.

pool.baseline: sometimes i just sit here in this apartment and realize that if i just... stopped existing tomorrow, nothing would actually change. like, the world keeps spinning, people keep working, and nobody here even knows my middle name. i'm just a ghost in a different city.
